scenarios.title: Duration-driven ratio improvement stays mixed

gherkin.given: Aligned adjusted-close JNK/LQD data strengthens while the same-direction duration effect is material and independent credit evidence does not improve
gherkin.when: The production credit regime evaluates the immutable observed snapshot
gherkin.then: The state is Mixed with an explicit duration-confounded conflict and is never Constructive from the ratio alone

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-001 duration-driven ratio improvement stays mixed

scenarios.title: Broad independent confirmation supports constructive credit

gherkin.given: JNK/LQD and HYG/LQD strengthen on common adjusted-close dates and a current independent confirmation family improves
gherkin.when: The two-key credit policy evaluates the evidence
gherkin.then: The state is Constructive within its confidence cap and names the ratio or confirmation deterioration that invalidates it

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-002 aligned ratios plus OAS confirmation are constructive

scenarios.title: Tight but widening spreads remain two facts

gherkin.given: An independent spread observation is inside the configured tight level band while its recent change exceeds the widening threshold
gherkin.when: Confirmation and decision records are built
gherkin.then: Tight level and widening momentum remain separately visible and the direction remains mixed

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-003 tight but widening keeps level and momentum separate

scenarios.title: Bull steepening retains defensive growth context

gherkin.given: The two-year yield falls faster than the ten-year yield while the current credit regime is Defensive
gherkin.when: Curve impulse and Duration Posture are classified
gherkin.then: The impulse is Bull Steepener and any Extend posture remains restricted to high-quality duration with growth-risk context

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-004 bull steepener retains defensive credit context

scenarios.title: Bear steepening penalizes long duration

gherkin.given: The ten-year yield rises faster than the two-year yield and real-yield or breakeven evidence confirms long-end pressure
gherkin.when: Duration Posture and one shared scenario are calculated
gherkin.then: The posture is Shorten and the long-Treasury rate contribution is more negative than the short-Treasury contribution

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-005 bear steepener penalizes long duration most

scenarios.title: Six-month rate-and-spread shock decomposes every sleeve

gherkin.given: The horizon is six months with signed Treasury, investment-grade, high-yield, and breakeven shocks
gherkin.when: The shared scenario engine calculates Treasury, corporate, and inflation-linked sleeves
gherkin.then: Every eligible result exposes carry rate spread convexity and total separately with correct spread applicability and TIPS mapping

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-006 six month mixed shock decomposes every sleeve

scenarios.title: Large shocks retain arithmetic with reduced reliability

gherkin.given: A finite scenario shock exceeds a configured local-approximation bound
gherkin.when: A result is calculated from current characteristics
gherkin.then: The arithmetic remains visible with Reduced reliability and names nonparallel curves optionality defaults liquidity and tracking

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-007 oversized shock preserves estimate and lowers reliability

scenarios.title: Stale characteristics block precise ranking

gherkin.given: A required carry duration spread-duration or convexity record is past its review window
gherkin.when: Scenario results are calculated and ranked
gherkin.then: The sleeve remains visible with the stale field named but receives no rank and cannot become the preferred expression

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-008 stale characteristic remains visible and unranked

scenarios.title: Missing optional macro evidence degrades honestly

gherkin.given: Adjusted ETF bars and current nominal Treasury rows are usable while optional OAS financial-conditions or real-yield evidence is unavailable
gherkin.when: The observed snapshot and view model are built
gherkin.then: Usable evidence remains visible and confidence reflects missing families without treating any missing value as zero

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-009 optional macro outage leaves truthful partial read

scenarios.title: Misaligned pair data uses common dates only

gherkin.given: One ETF pair leg has a newer observation date absent from the other leg
gherkin.when: Common-date rows and the ratio series are built
gherkin.then: The unmatched row is excluded and the visible as-of is the newest exact UTC date shared by both legs

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-010 latest common date excludes unmatched leg

scenarios.title: Simple and Power remain coherent

gherkin.given: One observed snapshot and scenario assumption set produce one BondLabViewModel
gherkin.when: The user switches between Simple and Power without refreshing
gherkin.then: Both modes expose identical decision digests regimes confidence expression ranking and invalidation with no request or reset

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-011 Simple and Power share one model digest

scenarios.title: Scenario lever edits never rewrite observations

gherkin.given: Observed credit and duration records have stable digests and source stamps
gherkin.when: The user changes a scenario lever
gherkin.then: Modeled totals ranking expression break-even and reliability update synchronously while observed records and request counts remain unchanged

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-012 lever change recomputes without fetch or observed mutation

scenarios.title: Restricted observations remain memory-only

gherkin.when: A valid current-tab observation is normalized and a tool read is published
gherkin.then: Its raw value and source URL remain only in runtime memory and never enter config storage shared cache or tool-read metrics

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-013 restricted observation remains memory only

scenarios.title: Partial-data operation remains keyboard and text equivalent

gherkin.when: A keyboard or screen-reader user traverses both modes at desktop and mobile widths
gherkin.then: Freshness conflicts confidence invalidation chart summaries reliability and source states are reachable without pointer hover motion or color dependence

linkedTests: tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs#BS-014 partial data is keyboard and text equivalent
